label: Sim-to-real, real-to-sim & digital transfer

node.label: Sim-to-real, real-to-sim & digital transfer
node.definition: Sim-to-real methods train or validate in simulation and transfer behavior to physical systems, often using real-to-sim calibration or residual adaptation to close the reality gap.
node.why_it_matters: They reduce the cost and danger of physical interaction while preserving a route to deployment.
limitations: Unmodeled dynamics, sensing artifacts, contacts, and rare events can cause severe transfer failure.

dependencies.rationale: Sim-to-real, real-to-sim & digital transfer follows the learning setup expressed by Transfer, multitask & domain adaptation.
Sim-to-real, real-to-sim & digital transfer follows the learning setup expressed by Model-based reinforcement learning.
Sim-to-real, real-to-sim & digital transfer uses Multimodal, simulated & streaming data as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Sim-to-real, real-to-sim & digital transfer uses Dynamical systems & control theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Sim-to-real methods train or validate in simulation and transfer behavior to physical systems, often using real-to-sim calibration or residual adaptation to close the reality gap.
They reduce the cost and danger of physical interaction while preserving a route to deployment.
Unmodeled dynamics, sensing artifacts, contacts, and rare events can cause severe transfer failure.
Sim-to-real, real-to-sim & digital transfer follows the learning setup expressed by Transfer, multitask & domain adaptation.
Sim-to-real, real-to-sim & digital transfer follows the learning setup expressed by Model-based reinforcement learning.

Sim-to-real, real-to-sim & digital transfer uses Dynamical systems & control theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
